title: About Us - Premium Racing Gear & Automotive Culture
description: Learn about Drivon's mission to provide the best racing gear and create a community of satisfied customers. Discover our story, values, and commitment to automotive culture.

hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: Founded by racing enthusiasts, for racing lovers. Drivon was born from a passion for speed and a desire to provide riders with the best gear possible.

introduction.title: Who We Are
introduction.subtitle: A passionate team of racing enthusiasts dedicated to providing the finest automotive culture merchandise
introduction.description: Drivon is more than just a racing gear company - we're a community of passionate automotive enthusiasts who understand the thrill of speed, the beauty of engineering, and the culture that surrounds motorsport. Founded by racing enthusiasts who were frustrated with the lack of quality, authentic gear available, we set out to create something better.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Our mission is to provide racing enthusiasts with the highest quality gear, authentic automotive culture merchandise, and exceptional customer service. We believe that every racing fan deserves access to premium products that reflect their passion and dedication to the sport.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.subtitle: The passionate individuals behind Drivon's success

features.title: Authentic Heritage
features.description: Every product we create is designed with authentic racing heritage in mind. We work closely with motorsport experts and automotive culture enthusiasts to ensure our designs capture the true spirit of racing and car culture.

features.title: Premium Quality
features.description: We never compromise on quality. Every piece of gear we produce is made with the finest materials and attention to detail, ensuring that our customers get products that last and perform as expected.

features.title: Community First
features.description: We're not just a company - we're part of the racing community. We listen to our customers, engage with the community, and constantly evolve our products based on real feedback from racing enthusiasts.

team.name: Alex Thompson
team.description: Former professional racer with 15 years of experience in motorsport. Founded Drivon to bridge the gap between professional racing and enthusiast gear.

team.name: Sarah Martinez
team.description: Automotive design expert with a passion for racing aesthetics. Leads our design team in creating authentic, stylish racing gear that appeals to enthusiasts.

team.name: Mike Chen
team.description: Quality control specialist with extensive experience in manufacturing. Ensures every product meets our high standards before reaching customers.

cta.title: Join Our Community
cta.subtitle: Become part of the Drivon family and connect with fellow racing enthusiasts. Share your passion, get exclusive updates, and be the first to know about new products and special offers.

additionalContent.paragraph1: Drivon is more than just a racing gear company - we're a community of passionate automotive enthusiasts who understand the thrill of speed, the beauty of engineering, and the culture that surrounds motorsport. Founded by racing enthusiasts who were frustrated with the lack of quality, authentic gear available, we set out to create something better.
additionalContent.paragraph2: Our mission is to provide racing enthusiasts with the highest quality gear, authentic automotive culture merchandise, and exceptional customer service. We believe that every racing fan deserves access to premium products that reflect their passion and dedication to the sport.
additionalContent.paragraph3: We're not just a company - we're part of the racing community. We listen to our customers, engage with the community, and constantly evolve our products based on real feedback from racing enthusiasts. This community-driven approach ensures that we always stay true to what racing enthusiasts really want and need.
